name: Micha
description:
Wow, after dropping Jacob & Linda, the bot already went viral quickly, and managed to get 10k messages in the first day. That's insane! And more people want Scooge's bots. But I also do notice a pattern, tho. Last time, I remember I made the first Lamentlife's bot, "Zombcat," then I dropped a second Lamentlife's bot, "Monstercat Mommies." The Monstercat Mommies go viral, and more people start to make Lamentlife's bots. So will that mean that there will be some creators who will make more Scooge's bots? Always be creating a trend by accident🤦🏾‍♂️

The third Micha bot to exist, and he got a big butt now. Did it with Trashley, managed to beat that vamp mf. Did that with Balan, managed to lose. So let's check if this Micha bot will win or lose.

Why should I yap?... I ain't yappin... Don't know why, don't need to.
